DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT FOR PLTFS. DEFT JOSEPH CUCCIO PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED PURS TO WRITTEN JUDGMENT PERSUANT TO STIPULATION AS PREPARED BY PLTF. PARTIES INDICATE UNDERSTANDING AND ACCEPTANCE OF SETTLEMENT & JUDGMNT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUCCIO, JOSEPH PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL STREET #723, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL MAR-19-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DMGS IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY. IF NOT, PLTF WILL HAVE AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR BACK RENT OF $170 & UD DMGS OF $10.00 PER DAY FROM 2/2/96 THRU 3/19/96 ALONG WITH $80 IN COSTS FOR TOTAL AMD JUDGMNT OF $720.00.
